home.hero_body: Free tools for foreign property owners in Spain. Understand your tax obligations, check if you are overpaying, and manage everything with confidence.
home.tools_heading: Everything you need to know about your Spanish property.
home.tools_sub: Built for foreign property owners who want clarity without the complexity. All tools are free, take under 2 minutes, and require no account.
home.readiness_desc: A full health check of your Spanish property setup across banking, tax compliance, energy, insurance, and property management. Know exactly where your gaps are.
home.why_sub: Free tools built for foreign property owners in Spain.
home.why_1_b: Made for non-residents who want clarity, not Spanish bureaucracy. Available in English, Norwegian, Swedish, German, French, and Dutch.
home.why_2_b: Every tool is completely free and takes under two minutes. No sign-up, no payment, no catch.
home.why_3_b: Plain-language answers to your Spanish property questions. No jargon, and no Spanish required.
home.why_4_b: Calculations follow current Spanish rules like Modelo 210 and IBI, so you know exactly where you stand.
home.band_text: Ready to stop overpaying and start managing your Spanish property
home.footer_copy: © 2025 Spain 24/7. For guidance only. Not legal or tax advice.

tax.title: Spanish Property Tax Calculator
tax.desc: Find out exactly how much to pay annually as a non-resident (Modelo 210). The calculation covers personal use, holiday rentals, and long-term rental. Unpaid taxes for previous years? We give you an estimate of your outstanding tax liability.

cost.title: Spanish Property Cost Audit
cost.desc: Find out how much your Spanish home really costs you each year. Most foreign owners overpay by €200-400 on account fees and electricity alone. See your exact overpayment and potential saving.

rental.title: Rental Income Tax Calculator
rental.desc: Calculate your exact Spanish rental income tax after all allowable deductions. EU/EEA residents can deduct property expenses, utilities, management fees, and depreciation. Most owners claim far less than they are entitled to.

claim.title: Spanish Mortgage Compensation
claim.desc: Took out a Spanish mortgage between 2000 and 2019? You may be able to reclaim overcharged set-up fees, floor clause interest, or mis-sold insurance. Estimate what you could claim back in 2 minutes.

calc_tax.intro_body: Some foreign property owners might not be aware of the tax to pay, how it is calculated, and how to file the tax return. This calculator estimates the non-resident tax for your property in under 2 minutes.
calc_tax.country_hint: Your country of residence determines your tax rate in Spain.
calc_tax.use_q: How do you use your Spanish property?
calc_tax.use_hint: This determines how your taxable income is calculated.
calc_tax.cadastral_q: What is your property's cadastral value?
calc_tax.cadastral_hint: Find it on your annual IBI (council tax) bill, listed as "Valor catastral".
calc_tax.cadastral_skip: Use a typical estimate (€100,000) and continue
calc_tax.revision_q: Has your cadastral value been revised in the last 10 years?
calc_tax.revision_hint: A General Cadastral Revision changes your tax rate from 2% to 1.1%. If unsure, we use 2%, the more conservative assumption.
calc_tax.rental_q: What was your total rental income last year?
calc_tax.rental_hint: Enter gross rental income before expenses. EU/EEA residents may deduct costs. UK and non-EU residents are taxed on gross income.
calc_tax.filing_hint: Modelo 210 is the Spanish non-resident property tax return, due by December 31 each year.
calc_tax.email_hint: Enter your email to receive your full breakdown and a personalised summary of your situation.
calc_tax.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
calc_tax.email_privacy: We will not share your email. Trusted by 2,000+ foreign property owners in Spain.
calc_tax.headline_current: Here is your annual tax obligation.
calc_tax.headline_unfiled_one: You may have 1 year of unfiled returns.
calc_tax.headline_unfiled_many: You may have {n} years of unfiled returns.
calc_tax.liability_disclaimer: Estimates only. Spain can assess up to 4 prior years. Consult a tax professional for your exact position.
calc_tax.cta_title: Let Bueno handle this for you.
calc_tax.cta_body: Bueno files your Modelo 210 in English, from start to finish. No Spanish forms, no tax office visits. If you have outstanding years, we can help you get compliant.
calc_tax.cta_price: €99/year includes a Spanish account, Visa card, and human support.
calc_tax.cross_cost: Check if you are overpaying on banking and energy
calc_tax.footer: For guidance only. Not legal or tax advice. Consult a qualified tax professional for your specific situation. Spain 24/7.
calc_tax.use_personal_d: I use it myself. I do not rent it out.
calc_tax.use_short_rental_d: Rented to tourists or guests, usually by the week.
calc_tax.use_long_rental_d: Rented to tenants on a monthly or annual basis.
calc_tax.use_mixed_d: I use it part of the year and rent it out the rest.
calc_tax.filing_always_d: I have filed Modelo 210 every year without exception.
calc_tax.filing_missed_some_d: I have missed one or more years.
calc_tax.filing_never_d: I have not filed a Spanish property tax return.
calc_tax.filing_unsure_d: I am not certain what Modelo 210 is or whether I have filed.

calc_cost.intro_body: Most foreign owners overpay by €200-400 every year without knowing it. This 2-minute audit shows exactly where your money is going and what you could save.
calc_cost.bank_q: Which Spanish bank do you currently use?
calc_cost.bank_hint: This determines your current annual account fees.
calc_cost.mortgage_q: Do you have a mortgage on your Spanish property?
calc_cost.mortgage_hint: Banks typically waive fees for mortgage holders. This affects your current cost.
calc_cost.mortgage_yes_d: My Spanish bank holds the mortgage on this property.
calc_cost.mortgage_no_d: I own the property outright or financed it elsewhere.
calc_cost.energy_q: Who is your Spanish electricity provider?
calc_cost.energy_hint: Switching to a cheaper electricity provider can save up to 50% on bills. This shows your potential saving.
calc_cost.headline_ok: Your current setup is already competitive.
calc_cost.savings_sub: per year, after Bueno membership of €99
calc_cost.included_p1: Your €99 Bueno membership includes a Spanish IBAN account, Visa debit card, multilingual human support, Bueno Energy switching, and the Bueno Club perks programme.
calc_cost.included_p2: Unlike traditional Spanish banks, there are no hidden charges, no language barriers, and no unexpected fees. Everything is transparent from day one.
calc_cost.cta_body: Open your Bueno account in minutes. Made specially for foreign owners. Human support in your preferred language, with 8 languages supported including English, Norwegian, Swedish, and Dutch.
calc_cost.cta_price: €99/year. Cancel anytime. Setup takes under 10 minutes.
calc_cost.cross_tax: Calculate your Spanish property tax obligation
calc_cost.footer: Estimates based on published bank tariffs and average energy consumption. For guidance only. Spain 24/7.

calc_rental.intro_body: Most foreign property owners pay more rental tax than they need to. EU and EEA residents can deduct property costs, utilities, management fees, and depreciation. This calculator shows your exact liability after all legal deductions.
calc_rental.residency_hint: EU and EEA residents can deduct property expenses and pay 19% tax. UK and non-EU residents pay 24% on gross rental income with no deductions.
calc_rental.res_eu_d: Norway, Sweden, Denmark, Germany, France, Netherlands, Belgium, Ireland, Finland, Austria, Iceland, or any other EU/EEA country.
calc_rental.res_noneu_d: United Kingdom, USA, Canada, Australia, or any country outside the EU/EEA.
calc_rental.income_hint: Enter your total rental income and how many days the property was rented out last year.
calc_rental.income_label_hint: All income received from tenants or guests, in euros.
calc_rental.days_hint: Total number of days the property was occupied by paying guests.
calc_rental.noneu_note: As a non-EU/UK resident, expenses are not deductible. Your tax is calculated on gross income at 24%.
calc_rental.prorated_hint: These are prorated: we divide each by 365 and multiply by your rental days. Enter the full annual amount. Leave blank if not applicable.
calc_rental.hint_electricity: Only if not charged to guests.
calc_rental.skip_prorated: Skip, I have no prorated expenses
calc_rental.annual_hint: These are deducted in full, not prorated. They must relate directly to the rental activity and require an official invoice with IVA.
calc_rental.hint_maintenance: Official invoice with IVA required. Only if property is used solely for rental.
calc_rental.hint_mgmt: Includes cleaning fees. Invoice with IVA required.
calc_rental.hint_advertising: Airbnb, Booking.com fees, or your own advertising costs.
calc_rental.hint_legal: Fees paid for legal or accounting services related to the rental.
calc_rental.skip_annual: Skip, I have no management costs
calc_rental.depreciation_hint: You can deduct 3% per year of the building value (not land), prorated by rental days. Use cadastral values if you do not have the purchase price and land split into two values.
calc_rental.hint_property_value: Or total cadastral property value (including land).
calc_rental.hint_land_value: Or cadastral land value. Depreciation applies only to the building, not the land.
calc_rental.hint_furniture: Enter 10% of your furniture purchase price. Furniture is written off over 10 years.
calc_rental.skip_depr: Skip, I will not claim depreciation
calc_rental.estimate_note: This is an estimate based on the information you provided. It is not a guarantee of your final tax liability. Always consult a qualified tax advisor for your specific situation.
calc_rental.result_headline: Your rental income tax for this year.
calc_rental.result_subline: Based on {income} rental income over {days} days.
calc_rental.panel_period: Quarterly filings / Modelo 210 / Q4 deadline January 20
calc_rental.capped: Deductions capped at rental income. Expenses cannot create a tax refund.
calc_rental.about_body: As a non-EU resident, Spain does not allow you to deduct property expenses from rental income. You pay a flat 24% on gross rental income. If your country has a double taxation treaty with Spain, you may be able to claim relief in your home country. Consult a tax advisor for your specific situation.
calc_rental.cta_body: Bueno files your Spanish rental income tax with the Spanish tax office. We can handle both your annual tax and rental tax, and ensure all deductions are correctly applied to your rental tax.
calc_rental.cta_price: €99/year includes a Spanish account, Visa card, and human support.
calc_rental.cross_cost: Check if you are overpaying on banking and energy
calc_rental.footer: Based on verified calculation model. For guidance only. Not legal or tax advice. Consult a qualified tax professional for your specific situation. Spain 24/7.

calc_claim.intro_body: Many foreign owners who took out a Spanish mortgage between 2000 and 2019 were overcharged on set-up fees, floor clauses, or insurance. This 2-minute check estimates what you may be able to claim back.
calc_claim.year_q: When did you take out your Spanish mortgage?
calc_claim.year_hint: Compensation rulings apply to mortgages signed between 2000 and 2019.
calc_claim.amount_q: Roughly how much did you borrow?
calc_claim.amount_hint: Your original mortgage amount. An estimate is fine. This scales your potential compensation.
calc_claim.amount_skip: Use a typical estimate (€150,000) and continue
calc_claim.claims_q: Which of these applied to your mortgage?
calc_claim.claims_hint: Select all that apply. If you are not sure, choose the last option and we will estimate the most common claim.
calc_claim.claim_setup_d: You paid the bank fees to arrange the mortgage. Around 99% of mortgages included these.
calc_claim.claim_floor_d: Your interest rate had a minimum it never dropped below, even when Euribor fell.
calc_claim.claim_insurance_d: You were required to take a single-premium life policy added to the loan.
calc_claim.claim_unsure_d: We will estimate the most common claim, set-up fees, as a starting point.
calc_claim.email_hint: Enter your email to receive your full breakdown and occasional Spain 24/7 updates for foreign owners.
calc_claim.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
calc_claim.email_privacy: We will not share your email. Unsubscribe anytime.
calc_claim.headline: You could be owed around {amt}.
calc_claim.subline: Based on your Spanish mortgage from {year}.
calc_claim.range_line: Most claims in your situation settle between {low} and {high}.
calc_claim.how_p1: These claims are made against the bank that issued your mortgage, usually through a Spanish lawyer or a claims firm. Most work on a no win, no fee basis.
calc_claim.how_p2: The amount you recover depends on your specific contract and a formal review. This estimate is a starting point, not a guarantee.
calc_claim.cta_title: Stay on top of your Spanish property.
calc_claim.cta_body: We have sent your breakdown by email. Bueno keeps the rest of your Spanish property simple, with a Spanish account, bills, and tax handling in your own language.
calc_claim.cta_price: Free tools from Spain 24/7. Bueno membership is €99/year.
calc_claim.cross_tax: Calculate your Spanish property tax obligation
calc_claim.cross_cost: Check if you are overpaying on banking and electricity
calc_claim.ineligible_headline: This compensation may not apply to you.
calc_claim.ineligible_body: The set-up fee, floor clause, and insurance rulings cover Spanish mortgages signed between 2000 and 2019. If your mortgage falls outside that window, you are unlikely to have one of these claims. Our other free tools can still help you understand your Spanish property.
calc_claim.footer: Estimates based on average reported claim outcomes and published court rulings. For guidance only. Not legal or financial advice. Spain 24/7 is not a claims firm. Spain 24/7.
